loop1.title: Battery Health
loop1.note: This electrical meter does not measure battery SOC, temperature, or output-specific voltage/current; showing headline state-of-charge is not possible.

loop1.title: Battery Health History
loop1.note: Showing proxy scores (Charge Level, DC Bus, Thermal, Overall) derived from electrical metrics (Energy, Voltage, Current, Power) as battery-specific scores are not measured by this UPS meter; thresholds and axis limits are also proxied.

loop1.title: Backup Readiness
loop1.note: Showing load factor as a proxy for headroom — battery autonomy envelope, backup time, and readiness scores are not measured by this UPS meter.

loop1.title: Backup Readiness History
loop1.note: Showing load factor as a proxy for autonomy/backup scores — this UPS meter does not measure battery-specific autonomy, runtime, or headroom indices directly.

loop2: 'ups-asset-dashboard/battery-autonomy' answers the prompt as routed; these cards cover quantities not recorded for this asset and render honest-blank per-leaf with the reason: Battery Health (This electrical meter does not measure battery SOC, temperature, or output-specific voltage/current; showing headline state-of-charge is not possible.).
